emails.subject: Re: Transaction Agreement
emails.body: Re: Transaction Agreement Tyrell, this confirm is still incorrect on Page 2 according to the file you sent me... at the top of Page 2, when you print it out it is still showing... JM Huber. I told Mark this, It was supposed to be fixed. You need to get it fixed, put in the deal date and get a new copy out to AEC... It is unacceptable that we sent this out again... in error BT

emails.subject: Re: Transaction Agreement
emails.body: I just spoke with Mark and he indicated that AEC is sending the agreement back to Gerald with a couple of amendments. Gerald or I will correct the header and add the deal date prior to resending the amended final agreement back to AEC. Tyrell Barry Tycholiz@ENRON 02/23/2001 07:06 AM
